prerequisites.value: Bluff 2 ranks, Knowledge (Local) 2 ranks, member of an underclass

description.value: **Benefit:** When dealing with criminals, vagabonds, unsavory characters, or other members of a countryâs underclass, you gain a +1 bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, Knowledge (Local), and Sense Motive checks. When traveling with at least one other person who has this feat, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus on Perception checks to avoid being surprised at the start of combat.
